asset_budgets.lodPolicy: LOD0 hero, LOD1 gameplay, LOD2 crowd/distance, impostor for space scale
performanceGuardrails: Prefer trim sheets, decals, and material variants over unique huge textures.
Every model must declare LODs, collision, streaming tags, and NGD priority.
No unbounded creature/ship spawn without procedural budget tags.
Visual ambition must respect 6GB VRAM and frame pacing.

guardrails: Blueprints are Cyberpunk-facing content definitions, not finished binary meshes.
Use WolvenKit/Blender production pass for mesh/material binaries.
Honor RTX 3060 6GB LOD and texture budgets.
Every model remains tied to MSN, Abyssal Assets, Lochness/Nessie, and business hooks.
